description:
A Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation physician needs to measure an angular alignment on a CT image for clinical documentation. Using the three-point angle measurement tool in Weasis, measure an alignment on the displayed image. Record the measured value in a text report at /home/ga/DICOM/exports/angle_report.txt using the following format:
Line 1: Angle: <measured_value>
Line 2: Unit: degrees
Line 3: Location: CT slice structure alignment
Additionally, save a screenshot of the viewer showing the angle measurement to /home/ga/DICOM/exports/angle_measurement.png.
